title: Coconut Aeronautics
description: Chill create aeronautics building smp with no big additional features in early phase
body:
Friendly create SMP with claims and Create Aeronautics. 
The mods are focused on performance and are built around Create Aeronautics. 
Farmer's delight and Terralith are extra. 

Have fun with building anything you can think of!

The server isn't that populated so there's a lot of building space.

datapack on the server are: https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-player-shops and https://modrinth.com/datapack/waystones-data-pack

https://discord.gg/HGxCZkz23 Join our discord for help, or if you just want to chill and  chat with others!
